w:r.w:t: <data xmlns:jrm="http://dev.commcarehq.org/jr/xforms" xmlns="http://openrosa.org/formdesigner/CAB8F134-EF68-440A-971A-0BBA9665E976" uiVersion="1" version="1" name="Knowledge Test on awareness and leadership ">

<value>Consent: Dear Participant, please indicate your answer in the space/answer part provided or by circling the option you believe is correct. Each question carries equal weight (20% of the total mark). Thank you for your time and participation.</value>
<value>Knowledge Test on Awarness and leadership on womens right</value>
<value>b) Visionary and live up to his words</value>
<value>One of the following is not contributing to be an effective leader</value>
<value>a. Understand own strength and weakness as a leader</value>
<value>d. Expect feedback only from your team</value>
